chat.welcome: How can I help you today?
chat.welcomeDesc: Ask me about your portfolios, market, financial, or any other tasks. I'm here to assist you.

disabledPlaceholder.gatewayUnknown: Unable to chat: Gateway status is still being checked. Please wait, then refresh the page or restart Launcher if needed.
disabledPlaceholder.gatewayStarting: Unable to chat: Gateway is starting. Wait for startup to complete, then try again.
disabledPlaceholder.gatewayRestarting: Unable to chat: Gateway is restarting. Please wait for restart to finish.
disabledPlaceholder.gatewayStopping: Unable to chat: Gateway is stopping. Wait for it to stop, then start Gateway again.
disabledPlaceholder.gatewayStopped: Unable to chat: Gateway is not started. Click Start Gateway in the top bar, then retry.
disabledPlaceholder.gatewayError: Unable to chat: Gateway is in an error state. Check logs, then restart Gateway or Launcher.
disabledPlaceholder.websocketConnecting: Connecting to chat service... Please wait.
disabledPlaceholder.websocketDisconnected: Unable to chat: WebSocket connection is disconnected. Check network and gateway status, then refresh the page or restart Launcher.
disabledPlaceholder.websocketError: Unable to chat: WebSocket connection failed. Check network and gateway status, then retry.
disabledPlaceholder.noDefaultModel: Unable to chat: No default model is selected. Set a default model on the Models page.

chat.notConnected: Gateway is not running. Start it to chat.
chat.historyOpenFailed: Failed to open this chat history

inputDisabled.notConnected: Gateway is not running. Start it to chat.
inputDisabled.noModel: No default model configured. Go to Models page to set one.

chat.sendHint:
Press Enter to send
Shift + Enter for a new line
chat.invalidImage: "{{name}}" is not a supported image file.

empty.noConfiguredModelDescription: You need to configure at least one AI model with an API key before you can start chatting.
empty.noSelectedModelDescription: You have configured models, but none is set as default. Select a model before starting chat.
empty.notRunningDescription: Start the gateway service to begin chatting. Use the Start Gateway button in the top bar.

stopDialog.title: Stop Gateway Service?
stopDialog.description: Are you sure you want to stop the gateway? This will disconnect your active chat sessions and halt inference.

gateway.restartRequired: Changes require a gateway restart to take effect.

credentials.description: Manage OAuth and token-based credentials for supported providers.

openai.description: Supports browser OAuth, device code, and token login.

anthropic.description: Uses token login for Claude access.

antigravity.description: For personal Gmail users with Google One AI Premium subscription. Sign in with your personal Google account.

gemini.description: For enterprise users with Gemini Code Assist Standard or Enterprise subscription. Sign in with your company Google Workspace account.

logoutDialog.title: Logout provider?
logoutDialog.description: This will remove your saved credential for {{provider}}.

errors.popupBlocked: Unable to open a new tab. Please allow popups and try again.

device.title: OpenAI Device Login
device.description: Open the verification page and enter the code below. This page will refresh automatically.

models.description: Configure API keys for AI providers. Only configured models are available for chat.
models.noDefaultHintPrefix: No default model set yet. Click

defaultOnSave.label: Default Model
defaultOnSave.description: Automatically set this model as default after saving.

add.title: Add Custom Model
add.description: Add an OpenAI-compatible or native model endpoint.
add.modelNameHint: A short name used to identify this model in conversations.
add.modelIdHint:
Format: protocol/model-id. Supported: openai, anthropic, gemini, groq, mlx_lm, ollama, …
 if local llm, protocal/{your}/{model}/{path} eg. 'mlx_lm/~/.my_model/gemma4/gemma-4-E4B-it-MLX'
add.errorDuplicateModelName: Model alias already exists. Please use a different name.

delete.title: Delete Model?
delete.description: "{{name}}" will be permanently removed from your model list. This cannot be undone.

field.apiKeyPlaceholderSet: Leave blank to keep existing key
field.authMethodHint: Authentication method: oauth, token. Leave blank for API key auth.
field.connectModeHint: Connection mode for CLI-based providers: stdio or grpc.
field.workspaceHint: Working directory for CLI-based providers (e.g. GitHub Copilot).
field.requestTimeoutHint: Maximum seconds to wait for a response. 0 = use default.
field.rpmHint: Maximum requests per minute. 0 = no limit.
field.thinkingLevelHint: Extended thinking budget: off, low, medium, high, xhigh, adaptive.
field.maxTokensFieldHint: Override the request field name for max tokens, e.g. max_completion_tokens.

edit.title: Configure {{name}}
edit.apiKeyHint: A key is already set. Leave blank to keep it unchanged.
edit.oauthNote: This provider uses OAuth — no API key required.

field.secretHintSet: A value is already set. Leave blank to keep it unchanged.

desc.token: Bot access token used to connect to the platform API.
desc.botToken: Bot token used to send and receive messages.
desc.appToken: App token used for Socket Mode connections.
desc.appId: Unique application ID used for authentication.
desc.appSecret: Application secret used for signing and authentication.
desc.encryptKey: Encryption key used to decrypt callback payloads.
desc.baseUrl: Platform API base URL. Official endpoint is used by default.
desc.proxy: HTTP proxy address for outbound network access.
desc.mentionOnly: Only respond when the bot is explicitly mentioned in group chats.
desc.typingEnabled: Display typing status while the assistant is generating a response.
desc.placeholderEnabled: Enable temporary placeholder messages before the final reply is sent.
desc.pairingEnabled: Require unknown users to request access via a pairing code before they can chat. Pending requests appear below.
desc.groupTriggerMentionOnly: In group chats, respond only when the bot is mentioned.
desc.groupTriggerPrefixes: Custom group-chat trigger prefixes. Add items one by one, or paste multiple values at once.
desc.isLark: Use Lark international domain (open.larksuite.com) instead of Feishu domain (open.feishu.cn).
desc.allowFrom: Allowed user or group IDs. Add items one by one, or paste multiple values at once.
desc.allowOrigins: Allowed origin domains. Add items one by one, or paste multiple values at once.
desc.useNative: Whether to use native client mode.
desc.clientId: Client ID used for platform authentication.
desc.welcomeMessage: Welcome message content for new sessions.
desc.allowTokenQuery: Allow token in URL query parameters.
desc.requestCaps: IRC capability list requested on connect.

agent.load_error: Failed to load agent support information.

skills.description: Skills are loaded from the workspace, global KhunQuant home, and builtin directories.
skills.delete_description: "{{name}}" will be removed from workspace skills.
skills.viewer_description: Read the current effective SKILL.md content here.

cron.empty_hint: Ask the agent to schedule a task — it will appear here.
cron.mode_static_desc: Send text directly — no agent or tools involved.
cron.mode_dynamic_desc: Run through the agent — can call tools and fetch live data.
cron.schedule_cron_hint: Standard cron syntax, e.g. "0 9 * * *" for 9 AM daily.
cron.field_message_static_hint: This text is sent directly to you when the job fires.
cron.field_message_dynamic_hint: This instruction is given to the agent on each trigger — write it so it fetches fresh data every time.
cron.channel_hint: Override the destination channel. Leave empty to use the channel from the message.
cron.to_placeholder: e.g. user ID or recipient identifier
cron.to_hint: Optional. Specific recipient user ID or identifier for the message.

pairing.empty_hint: When an unknown Telegram user sends a message, their pairing code will appear here.
pairing.approve_success: User approved. Restart gateway to apply.

agent_memory.new_file_description: Enter a path like NOTE.md (root) or 202603/note.md (monthly). The .md extension is added automatically.
agent_memory.unsaved_confirm: You have unsaved changes. Discard them?

snapshot.select_hint: Select a snapshot to view details.

agent_config.new_file_description: Enter a name for the new markdown file. The .md extension will be added automatically.
agent_config.unsaved_confirm: You have unsaved changes. Discard them?

tools.description: This view reflects whether each agent tool is enabled, disabled, or blocked by a missing prerequisite.

reasons.requires_linux: This tool only works on Linux hosts with the required device files exposed.
reasons.requires_skills: Enable `tools.skills` before this skill-registry tool can be used.
reasons.requires_subagent: Enable `tools.subagent` before the spawn tool can delegate work.
reasons.requires_mcp_discovery: Enable `tools.mcp.discovery` before MCP discovery tools become available.

config.load_error: Failed to load configuration. Please refresh and try again.
config.workspace_hint: Base directory for agent file operations.
config.restrict_workspace_hint: Only allow file operations inside workspace.
config.allow_remote_hint: When enabled, shell commands can also run for remote sessions or non-local contexts. When disabled, shell execution stays limited to local safe contexts.
config.temperature_hint: Controls randomness in model responses. Range: 0 to 2. Recommended: 0.7.
config.follow_up_nudge_hint: When enabled, if the agent describes an action without calling a tool on the first response, it will be nudged once to actually call the tool.
config.max_tokens_hint: Upper token limit per model response.
config.max_tool_iterations_hint: Maximum tool-call loops in a single task.
config.summarize_threshold_hint: Start summarization after this many messages.
config.summarize_token_percent_hint: Used when conversation summary is triggered.
config.context_manager_hint: Controls how context is compressed when the conversation grows long.
config.context_manager_legacy_desc: Summarizes old messages when context is full.
config.context_manager_seahorse_desc: Budget-aware SQLite-backed memory with lossless compression.
config.session_scope_hint: How chat context is isolated across peers/channels.
config.session_scope_per_channel_peer_desc: Separate context for each user in each channel.
config.session_scope_per_peer_desc: One context per user across channels.
config.session_scope_global_desc: All messages share one global context.
config.heartbeat_interval_hint: Interval in minutes between heartbeat signals.
config.monitor_usb_hint: Watch USB plug/unplug events when devices are enabled.
config.autostart_hint: Start KhunQuant Web automatically when you log in.
config.autostart_unsupported: Launch at login is not supported on this platform.
config.server_port_hint: HTTP port used by KhunQuant Web.
config.lan_access_hint: Allow access from other devices on your local network.
config.allowed_cidrs_hint: Only clients from these CIDR ranges can access the service. One per line or comma-separated. Leave empty to allow all.
config.reset_confirm_desc: Are you sure you want to reset your unsaved changes back to the last saved state?
config.reset_success: Changes have been reset to the last saved state.

portfolios.proxy_description: Route exchange API traffic through a proxy for IP allowlisting. Configure your exchange API key to allow only the proxy server's IP for enhanced security.
portfolios.proxy_hint: Optional proxy URL for exchange API requests. Useful for IP whitelisting via a VPS. Supported: http://, https://, socks5://

binance.api_key_hint: Your Binance API key with read permissions.
binance.secret_hint: Your Binance API secret. Stored locally in config.
binance.credential_set: Already set — enter new value to update
binance.testnet_hint: Connect to Binance testnet instead of mainnet.

binanceth.api_key_hint: Your Binance TH API key with read permissions.
binanceth.secret_hint: Your Binance TH API secret. Stored locally in config.
binanceth.credential_set: Already set — enter new value to update

bitkub.api_key_hint: Your Bitkub API key with read permissions.
bitkub.secret_hint: Your Bitkub API secret. Stored locally in config.
bitkub.credential_set: Already set — enter new value to update

okx.api_key_hint: Your OKX API key with read permissions.
okx.secret_hint: Your OKX API secret. Stored locally in config.
okx.passphrase_hint: The passphrase you set when creating the OKX API key.
okx.credential_set: Already set — enter new value to update
okx.testnet_hint: Connect to OKX demo trading environment instead of live.

settrade.api_key_hint: Your SETTRADE app ID (from the developer portal).
settrade.secret_hint: Base64-encoded raw ECDSA P-256 private key scalar provided by your broker.
settrade.credential_set: Already set — enter new value to update
settrade.broker_id_hint: Your broker code assigned by SETTRADE (e.g. FSSVP).
settrade.broker_api_support_desc: Not all brokers support the Settrade Open API. If you are not sure whether your broker supports API access, read the
settrade.app_code_hint: Application code from the developer portal (e.g. ALGO).
settrade.pin_hint: Trading PIN used to authorize order placement.
settrade.pin_set: Already set — enter new value to update
